features: Your skincare saviour for dehydrated - Our Face Facts Hyaluronic Face Cream is a match for thirsty skin, deeply hydrating skin for that healthy glow.
Lightweight facial moisturiser - That sinks in effortlessly but still leaving skin supple + soft.
Hero active is Sodium Hyaluronate - That will help smooth, plump & deliver hyper hydration and glycerine for that added moisturisation.
Lightweight texture - That sinks in effortlessly but still leaving skin supple + soft.
Perfect skin prep - Use before applying makeup for a fresh healthy glow.
description: Product Description Our face cream is a match for thirsty skin, deeply hydrating skin for that healthy glow. The hero active is Hyaluronic acid, that will help smooth, plump & deliver hyper hydration and Glycerin for that added moisturisation. Ingredients Aqua, Paraffinum Liquidum, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Glyceryl Stearate, Steareth-20, Ceteareth-6, DMDM Hydantoin, C13-14 Isoparaffin, Laureth-7, Parfum, Polyacrylamide, Sodium Hyaluronate. Directions Use after exfoliating, cleansing & toning the skin. Apply a small amount of the moisturiser and gently massage into the skin. Do not rinse off. Use daily, alongside the Face Facts Hyaluronic collection to complete your skincare routine. Safety Warning Avoid Contact With Eyes See more
